title: Scale CloudNative-PG Postgres to 3 Replicas, Enable PgBouncer, and Configure Automated Backups
subtasks: Update the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR in the production namespace to set spec.instances: 3 for high availability.
Deploy PgBouncer as a sidecar or separate deployment for connection pooling; configure applications to use PgBouncer endpoint.
Enable automated daily backups in CNPG, targeting MinIO S3-compatible storage (hermes-prod-artifacts bucket).
Configure WAL archiving to MinIO for point-in-time recovery.
Document backup retention and recovery procedures in the Helm chart README.
Verify that failover and backup/restore procedures work as expected.

title: Scale Redis to 3-Node Sentinel Cluster and Configure Maxmemory Policy
subtasks: Update Redis Helm values for production to deploy a 3-node Redis Sentinel cluster (1 master, 2 replicas, 3 sentinels).
Enable Redis persistence and configure appropriate storage size.
Set a maxmemory policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) to prevent OOM and ensure predictable eviction.
Update connection strings in Secrets/ConfigMaps to point to the Sentinel endpoint.
Document failover and recovery steps in the README.

title: Scale NATS to 3-Node Cluster and Enable JetStream Persistence
subtasks: Update NATS Helm values for production to deploy a 3-node NATS cluster with cluster.enabled: true.
Configure JetStream with persistent storage (PVCs) for message durability.
Set up NATS cluster discovery and update service endpoints in ConfigMaps/Secrets.
Test failover and message durability across node restarts.
Document cluster topology and operational procedures.

title: Harden MinIO Storage: Enable Erasure Coding and Add Volume Servers (if Dedicated)
subtasks: If using a dedicated MinIO instance, update the deployment to enable erasure coding for improved durability.
Add additional MinIO volume servers to support erasure coding (minimum 4 for EC).
Verify MinIO health and data redundancy after scaling.
Update documentation to reflect new MinIO topology and recovery steps.

title: Configure TLS Certificates via cert-manager for All Ingress Endpoints
subtasks: Install and configure cert-manager if not already present.
Issue TLS certificates for all public ingress endpoints using Let's Encrypt or internal CA.
Annotate Ingress resources to use the correct cert-manager ClusterIssuer or Issuer.
Verify certificate issuance and renewal automation.
Document certificate management process.

title: Deploy and Configure Ingress Controller (NGINX or Envoy) for Production Traffic
subtasks: Deploy a production-grade Ingress controller (NGINX or Envoy) with high availability (multiple replicas).
Configure secure TLS termination and HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection.
Set up rate limiting, request size limits, and security headers.
Update Ingress resources for all Hermes services to use the production Ingress class.
Document Ingress controller configuration and operational procedures.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for Static Asset Delivery
subtasks: Set up Cloudflare CDN for all static asset endpoints (e.g., MinIO public buckets, web frontend).
Configure DNS records and CNAMEs for CDN integration.
Set appropriate cache-control headers for static assets.
Test CDN cache hit/miss and failover behavior.
Document CDN configuration and troubleshooting steps.

title: Enforce Network Policies for Pod-to-Pod Traffic Restriction
subtasks: Review and update CiliumNetworkPolicies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic to only necessary communication paths.
Implement namespace isolation and restrict egress to only required services (e.g., database, MinIO, NATS).
Test network policy enforcement using test pods and network connectivity checks.
Document network policy structure and update diagrams in README.

title: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector with Production Sampling and Exporters
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector as a Deployment or DaemonSet in production.
Configure appropriate sampling rates for traces and metrics (e.g., 10% for traces, 100% for metrics).
Set up exporters to Jaeger (for traces) and Prometheus/Grafana (for metrics).
Update application instrumentation to send data to the collector endpoint.
Document observability pipeline and sampling configuration.

title: Deploy Jaeger with Persistent Storage for Trace Retention
subtasks: Deploy Jaeger in production with persistent storage (e.g., PVC-backed Elasticsearch or other supported backend).
Configure trace retention period according to SLOs (e.g., 7-30 days).
Integrate Jaeger with OpenTelemetry Collector.
Test trace ingestion, querying, and retention.
Document Jaeger deployment and retention policy.

title: Define and Deploy Alert Rules for SLO Violations
subtasks: Define Prometheus alert rules for key SLOs (e.g., error rate, latency, availability for each service).
Deploy alert rules to the monitoring stack.
Test alert firing and notification delivery (e.g., Slack, email).
Document SLO definitions and alerting procedures.
